allow: Bash(gh repo create sebastianmesserer/sebastianmesserer.com --public --description "Personal essay site" 2>&1)
Bash(git init && git add package.json package-lock.json astro.config.mjs tsconfig.json .gitignore src/ public/ .github/ 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial site: Astro essay site with sidebar TOC, SEO, and GitHub Pages deployment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/sebastianmesserer/sebastianmesserer.com.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git add astro.config.mjs src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix CSS and canonical URLs for GitHub Pages subpath deployment

Set base: '/sebastianmesserer.com' so Astro prefixes asset paths correctly.
Strip base from Astro.url.pathname before computing canonical/OG URLs so they
resolve to the custom domain root rather than doubling the subpath.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(git add public/CNAME astro.config.mjs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Connect custom domain sebastianmesserer.com

Add CNAME file and remove base path now that the domain handles routing from root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)
Bash(git config --global user.name "Sebastian Messerer" && git config --global user.email "sebastian@sebastianmesserer.com")
Bash(git add src/content/essays/one-machine.md src/content/essays/ src/plugins/ src/styles/global.css src/pages/index.astro src/pages/about.astro astro.config.mjs && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add One Machine essay, update About and homepage, add footnotes

- Replace sample essay with One Machine \(real content\)
- Footnotes rendered as superscript numbers linking to Notes section at bottom
- Update homepage intro copy
- Update About page with bio text and new email

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)
